descFull: You're the boss, agents are your team. They handle tasks on their own, message each other, and review each other's work. You just watch the kanban board and give high-level commands. Codex/Claude/OpenCode/Cursor/Grok/GitHub Copilot/Kiro/Z.AI/MiniMax/Kimi(200+ models, 75+ LLM providers, free models no auth). Build your AI company with multiple teams
